title: bulbine spongiosa
intro: Bulbine spongiosa, also known as "cat's tail" or "bush lily", is a succulent plant belonging to the Asphodelaceae family. The bulbine spongiosa plant has been traditionally used in South African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits include treating various conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, due to its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of bulbine spongiosa include infusions, tinctures, and creams, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
